items.name: Ultra Heavy Flak Jacket Armor (Desert Tan)
items.description:
High durability NERA plates rated for repeated strikes, Treated Hyper-Ballistic-Aramid Textiles, all woven and forged into a 127lb "Flak jacket" that can probably catch a whole lot more than just shrapnel.. That being you can even stand with it on..

This one's a tan / desert-y color; A fine subtle choice between heat-exposure or shrapnel-exposure.
Frankly I wouldn't want to wear anything heavier than 20lbs out in the heat even if it was armor

Made By Lulzisback33

tags lol: ballistic vest body armor tactical plate carrier eod juggernaut bomb suit sand sandy arid dry camo

items.name: Blueberrinni Octopusini
items.description:
🫐🐙 Blueberrinni Octopusini 🐙🫐

From the sparkling Blueberry Seas 🌊✨ comes Blueberrinni Octopusini — the sweetest, splashiest little legend to ever pop into Pop Box! 💙🎉

With shimmering blueberry-blue tentacles 🫐💫 and a bubbly personality that pops with energy 💥😆, this ocean cutie loves bouncing, spinning, and celebrating every big win! 🏆🎊 Rumor says each tentacle holds a tiny burst of lucky pop power… but only true Pop Box players can unlock it! 🎯🔥

Dripping in berry sparkle ✨🫧 and ocean magic 🌊🔮, Blueberrinni Octopusini isn’t just adorable — it’s a badge of honor for dedicated pop masters! 💙👑

🌟 LIMITED TIME
🎮 ONLY in Pop Box
🚫 Nowhere else

Catch it before it swims back to the deep blue! 🌊⏳🐙
